---
title: "weather_variable_visuals"
output: md_document
date: "2026-02-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


# Scraping Capacity Numbers from Wikipedia

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(corrplot)
delay <- read.csv("core_2015_2024.csv")
```

```{r}
# categorical variables
delay$Sun.Belt <- factor(delay$Sun.Belt, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Non-Sun Belt", "Sun Belt"))
delay$Configuration <- factor(delay$Configuration)
delay$Crosswind <- factor(delay$Crosswind, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes"))

# Y variables
ggplot(delay, aes(x = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25) +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25) +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations")

# X variables
ggplot(delay, aes(x = Sun.Belt)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(title = "Sun Belt")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Runways)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Runways")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Configuration)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(title = "Runway Configuration")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Crosswind)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(title = "Crosswind")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = VMC.Max.Capacity)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25) +
  labs(title = "VMC Max Capacity")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Gates)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25) +
  labs(title = "Gates")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Perc.Visible)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25) +
  labs(title = "Percent Visible")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Lost.Capacity.Visibility)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25) +
  labs(title = "Lost Capacity from Visibility")



# Y vs X: Weather.Delays
ggplot(delay, aes(x = Sun.Belt, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs Sun Belt")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Runways, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs Runways")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Configuration, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs Configuration")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Crosswind, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs Crosswind")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = VMC.Max.Capacity, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs VMC Capacity")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Gates, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs Gates")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Perc.Visible, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs Percent Visible")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Lost.Capacity.Visibility, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs Lost Capacity")



# Y vs X: Weather.cancel
ggplot(delay, aes(x = Sun.Belt, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs Sun Belt")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Runways, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs Runways")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Configuration, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs Configuration")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Crosswind, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs Crosswind")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = VMC.Max.Capacity, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs VMC Capacity")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Gates, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs Gates")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Perc.Visible, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs Percent Visible")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Lost.Capacity.Visibility, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs Lost Capacity")



# X vs X interactions
ggplot(delay, aes(x = Runways, y = Gates)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Runways vs Gates")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Runways, y = VMC.Max.Capacity)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Runways vs VMC Capacity")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Gates, y = VMC.Max.Capacity)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Gates vs VMC Capacity")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Perc.Visible, y = Lost.Capacity.Visibility)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Percent Visible vs Lost Capacity")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Configuration, y = VMC.Max.Capacity)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "VMC Capacity vs Configuration")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Crosswind, y = VMC.Max.Capacity)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "VMC Capacity vs Crosswind")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Sun.Belt, y = Gates)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Gates vs Sun Belt")





# correlation matrix for numeric X variables
x_num <- delay %>%
  select(Runways, VMC.Max.Capacity, Gates, Perc.Visible, Lost.Capacity.Visibility)

cor_mat <- cor(x_num, use = "complete.obs")
corrplot(cor_mat, method = "circle")
```

```{r}
#3/26 Update
#normalized y variable
delay$Weather.Delays.per.Capacity <- delay$Weather.Delays / delay$VMC.Max.Capacity
delay$Weather.Delays.per.Gate <- delay$Weather.Delays / delay$Gates

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Sun.Belt, y = Weather.Delays.per.Capacity)) +
  geom_boxplot()


#compare delays vs cancellations
delay$Cancel.Ratio <- delay$Weather.cancel / (delay$Weather.cancel + delay$Weather.Delays)

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Perc.Visible, y = Cancel.Ratio)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")


#split by region
ggplot(delay, aes(x = Perc.Visible, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(~Sun.Belt)

#interaction
ggplot(delay, aes(x = Perc.Visible, y = Weather.Delays.per.Capacity, color = Sun.Belt)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")

#identify non-linear patterns
ggplot(delay, aes(x = Perc.Visible, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess")

```

```{r}
#9/9 Update
# keep pre- and post-COVID periods only
delay_did <- delay %>%
  filter(Year != 2020)

# rebuild variables safely
delay_did <- delay_did %>%
  mutate(
    Sun.Belt.num = case_when(
      Sun.Belt %in% c(1, "1", "Sun Belt", "SunBelt") ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    Sun.Belt = factor(Sun.Belt.num, levels = c(0, 1),
                      labels = c("Non-Sun Belt", "Sun Belt")),
    Post.COVID.num = ifelse(Year >= 2021, 1, 0),
    Post.COVID = factor(Post.COVID.num, levels = c(0, 1),
                        labels = c("Pre-COVID", "Post-COVID")),
    log.vol.delays = log(Vol.Delays + 1)
  )

# simple DiD plot
ggplot(delay_did,
       aes(x = Post.COVID, y = log.vol.delays,
           group = Sun.Belt, color = Sun.Belt)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 3) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Difference-in-Differences: Log Volume Delays",
    x = "",
    y = "log(Vol.Delays + 1)",
    color = "Region"
  )

# basic DiD model
did_basic <- lm(log.vol.delays ~ Sun.Belt * Post.COVID, data = delay_did)
summary(did_basic)

# DiD model with controls
did_controls <- lm(log.vol.delays ~ Sun.Belt * Post.COVID +
                     Gates + Runways + VMC.Max.Capacity + Configuration,
                   data = delay_did)
summary(did_controls)

# DiD model with year fixed effects
did_fe <- lm(log.vol.delays ~ Sun.Belt * Post.COVID +
               Gates + Runways + VMC.Max.Capacity + Configuration + factor(Year),
             data = delay_did)

summary(did_fe)

# group means for interpretation
delay_did %>%
  group_by(Sun.Belt, Post.COVID) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_vol_delays = mean(Vol.Delays, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_log_vol_delays = mean(log.vol.delays, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

```{r}
#4/15 Update
did_final <- lm(log.vol.delays ~ Sun.Belt * Post.COVID +
                  Gates + Runways + VMC.Max.Capacity + Configuration,
                data = delay_did)

summary(did_final)


#ARIMA
library(forecast)
# load data
delay2 <- read.csv("core_2015_2024_v2.csv", check.names = FALSE)

# create WICR
delay2$WICR <- delay2$Weather.cancel / 
  (delay2$Weather.cancel + delay2$Weather.Delays)

# aggregate by year (average across airports)
wicr_year <- delay2 %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(WICR = mean(WICR, na.rm = TRUE))

# view data
wicr_year

# create time series object
wicr_ts <- ts(wicr_year$WICR, start = min(wicr_year$Year), frequency = 1)

# plot time series
plot(wicr_ts,
     main = "Weather-Induced Cancellation Ratio Over Time",
     ylab = "WICR",
     xlab = "Year")

# fit automatic ARIMA model
wicr_arima <- auto.arima(wicr_ts)

# model summary
summary(wicr_arima)

# residual diagnostics
checkresiduals(wicr_arima)

# forecast next 3 years
forecast_wicr <- forecast(wicr_arima, h = 3)

# plot forecast
plot(forecast_wicr,
     main = "Forecast of Weather-Induced Cancellation Ratio")

```
